info.description: REST API for the Gym Pulse workout tracking app.
info.title: Gym Pulse API

get.description: Returns all body weight entries for the authenticated user, ordered by date descending.

post.description: Creates or updates a body weight entry for the given date. Only one entry per date is kept.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a body weight entry by its ID.

get.description: Returns the curated exercise catalog, optionally filtered by workout type category.

parameters.description: Workout type id to filter by (e.g. push, pull, legs, cardio)
parameters.name: category

get.description: Returns, for each comma-separated exercise id, the completed sets from the most recent day that exercise was performed — powers "last time you did X" hints.
get.summary: Most recent completed sets per exercise

get.description: Returns each comma-separated exercise's heaviest weight and best estimated 1RM (Epley), from completed weighted sets.
Returns all day logs in the week containing the given Monday date.
get.summary: List day logs for a week

parameters.description: Week start date (Monday) in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: week

post.description: Logs a workout session for the given date. Only one log per date is allowed.

409.description: A log already exists for this date

get.description: Returns the full day log for a specific date including template and overrides.

put.description: Updates session notes and replaces the exercise override list for the given date.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the day log for the given date.

get.description: Returns the recurring weekly plan plus per-date overrides in the requested window (default: ±4 weeks around today). Effective-day resolution is the client's responsibility.

put.description: Overrides the weekly plan for one date without changing the recurring plan.

delete.description: Deletes the override; the date falls back to the recurring weekly plan.

put.description: Fully replaces the recurring plan. Sparse is allowed; weekdays missing from the request become unplanned.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile (display name, avatar, onboarding status).

put.description: Updates display name and avatar URL for the authenticated user. Sets onboarding_completed to true.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's settings (weight unit, weekly goal).

put.description: Updates weight unit and weekly goal for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a breakdown of workout counts by type and subtype.
Returns this week's progress, current streak, and total workout count.
Total lifted volume (Σ weight × reps) per week for the last N weeks (default 8), oldest first; weeks with no data are 0.
Returns all workout templates for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by type or subtype.

parameters.description: Filter by type (push, pull, legs, cardio, upper, lower, full, core, other)
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Filter by subtype (hypertrophy, strength, power, endurance, mobility, conditioning, skills, general)
parameters.name: subtype

post.description: Creates a new workout template with exercises.

get.description: Returns the full workout template including exercises.

put.description: Replaces the template name, type, subtype, and full exercise list.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a workout template and its exercises.

get.description: Returns 200 when the server is up.

BearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token — prefix value with "Bearer "
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
